notes: The sheet uses a fixed 7x2 grid for Phaser spritesheet loading.
Row 0 contains idle frames; row 1 contains a running cycle.
The walking animation key is retained for runtime compatibility and uses the same row 1 running frames.
Bill's base body is intentionally arm-free so weapon-specific arms can rotate independently.
Recreated from scratch in a 16-bit action-game style using Bill reference images under docs/art/reference/players/bill.
